sentence: 餐厅收了服务费，另加了税。
pinyin: Cāntīng shōu le fúwùfèi, lìng jiā le shuì.
english: The restaurant charged a service fee with tax added on top.

sentence: 他气急了，骂了一句婊子。
pinyin: Tā qì jí le, mà le yī jù biǎozi.
english: He was furious and shouted an insult.

sentence: 英国王室的婚礼吸引了全球关注。
pinyin: Yīngguó wángshì de hūnlǐ xīyǐn le quánqiú guānzhù.
english: The British royal family's wedding attracted worldwide attention.

sentence: 这座寺庙每天都有很多信徒来祈祷。
pinyin: Zhè zuò sìmiào měitiān dōu yǒu hěn duō xìntú lái qídǎo.
english: Many believers come to this temple to pray every day.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了一架老式轰炸机。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le yī jià lǎoshì hōngzhàjī.
english: The museum has an old bomber on display.
